text: Hello. Hello. Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care, Virginia. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help without a pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? I'm sorry. I couldn't quite catch that. Can you please share your age with me? So we actually have your number here scheduled for a call back. We are leading aggregators of hospital indemnity plans and we offer more than just basic hospital stay support. So our plans include affordable rates, hospital admission benefits, daily stay support and ICU benefits. Can you please tell me how old you are? I think I missed that. Do you speak English? I apologize. We only have English speaking staff available right now. Thank you for your time.
